source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d, utm_content split) + Shopify orders (90d, by country)
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Performance refreshed weekly by Polly. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, ga4_country_28d_crosscheck, built_not_yet_live) are preserved for future UI surfaces.

experiments.name: Big Box LP — Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of all 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).
experiments.polly_note: B leads this week (0.65% vs 0.38% on all-language aggregate; 19 vs 11 transactions). BUT the prior 7d window had A ahead — the swing means we are NOT yet at statistical significance (need ~100 conversions/variant; we have 11-19). KEEP RUNNING 2-3 more weeks before declaring a winner. No action to change variants yet. NOTE: GA4 conv% here understates true conversion because LP->checkout attribution is lossy (see localized experiment) — treat A-vs-B as relative, not absolute.

experiments.name: Localized LP variants (IT / FR / DE)
experiments.hypothesis: Translated A/B variants would convert non-EN paid traffic at rates comparable to EN.

real_sales_90d.note: These markets DO convert and sell. The ~0% on the LP rows above is a MEASUREMENT artifact, not a funnel failure.

experiments.polly_note: CORRECTED (was 'paused-recommended'). Root cause is the LP->checkout CONVERSION MEASUREMENT, not the funnel. Cross-checked three ways: (1) Shopify orders 90d — IT 97 orders/€9,028 (our 3rd-largest market), DE 58/€5,329, FR 44/€5,069; (2) Shopify session conv — IT 1.72%, FR 1.73%, DE 2.86% (all normal); (3) GA4 by-country 28d — IT 34 txn, FR 13, DE 18 (purchases clearly exist). The localized LP rows read ~0% only because LP->checkout attribution is lost (GA4 currency/attribution bug surfaced earlier). DO NOT PAUSE IT/FR/DE — that would kill our 3rd-largest market. ACTION: fix the attribution so LP-level conv reflects reality (align GA4 purchase currency + ensure same GA4 property fires through checkout); until then, judge localized LP performance by engagement (bounce, scroll) + market-level Shopify orders, not LP conv%.

built_not_yet_live.name: V3 (bundle widget + UGC reel + FB comment proof)
built_not_yet_live.note: Ready to promote to a live A/B vs B once current test concludes.

built_not_yet_live.name: Try the Game (interactive 3-phase playable demo)
built_not_yet_live.note: Play-before-you-pay hook. Candidate for its own dedicated LP + Meta test.
